vocab.meaning: gánh vác trọng trách/gánh nặng của...
vocab.example: In my current role, I often have to shoulder the burden of making critical financial decisions under pressure.

vocab.meaning: điều phối/sắp xếp các khâu hậu cần
vocab.example: I orchestrate the logistics for our international trade fairs to ensure everything runs like clockwork.

vocab.meaning: duy trì các tiêu chuẩn nghiêm ngặt
vocab.example: It is my duty to uphold rigorous standards of data privacy across all company platforms.

vocab.meaning: hòa giải các tranh chấp nội bộ
vocab.example: As a HR manager, I frequently mediate internal disputes to maintain a harmonious office environment.

vocab.meaning: mang lại những kết quả hữu hình/rõ rệt
vocab.example: My performance is primarily measured by my ability to deliver tangible results in terms of monthly sales growth.
I am tasked with deciding how to allocate resources effectively among the various research projects.

vocab.meaning: kiểm soát chặt chẽ điều gì đó
vocab.example: I keep a tight rein on the department's overhead costs to prevent any unnecessary expenditures.

vocab.meaning: liên lạc/làm việc với các đối tác tương đương
vocab.example: I regularly liaise with my counterparts in the European branch to align our global marketing strategy.

vocab.meaning: nâng cấp/cải tổ toàn bộ các hệ thống lỗi thời
vocab.example: My main objective this year is to overhaul outdated systems and migrate our data to the cloud.

vocab.meaning: cung cấp sự hướng dẫn chuyên môn kỹ thuật
vocab.example: I provide technical mentorship to junior developers to help them sharpen their coding skills.
